mapper.select: SELECT * FROM daily_investment_snapshot WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND snapshot_date = #{date}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_investment_snapshot (user_id, snapshot_date, total_value_cny, total_cost_cny, unrealized_pnl, cn_a_value_cny, hk_value_cny, us_value_cny, hk_opt_value_cny, us_opt_value_cny, other_value_cny) VALUES (#{userId}, #{snapshotDate}, #{totalValueCny}, #{totalCostCny}, #{unrealizedPnl}, #{cnAValueCny}, #{hkValueCny}, #{usValueCny}, #{hkOptValueCny}, #{usOptValueCny}, #{otherValueCny}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_value_cny = VALUES(total_value_cny), total_cost_cny = VALUES(total_cost_cny), unrealized_pnl = VALUES(unrealized_pnl), cn_a_value_cny = VALUES(cn_a_value_cny), hk_value_cny = VALUES(hk_value_cny), us_value_cny = VALUES(us_value_cny), hk_opt_value_cny = VALUES(hk_opt_value_cny), us_opt_value_cny = VALUES(us_opt_value_cny), other_value_cny = VALUES(other_value_cny)
